keyVault.copilotHowToCreate: How to create your Copilot token:
keyVault.copilotHowToCreateCompact: Token name & Expiration (90 days) > Account permissions → search Copilot > Enable: Copilot Chat, Editor Context, Requests > Generate token → paste below
keyVault.copilotHowToCreateSteps:
• 1. Set any Token name and Expiration (90 days recommended)
  • 2. Under Account permissions → search "Copilot"
  • 3. Enable: Copilot Chat, Copilot Editor Context, Copilot Requests (Read-only)
  • 4. Click Generate token → copy and paste below
keyVault.copilotPasteTokenDesc: After creating the token, copy and paste it here
keyVault.copilotInvalidTokenFormat: Invalid token format — should start with github_pat_
keyVault.copilotTokenDesc: GitHub Personal Access Token used to authenticate Copilot API requests

channels.connectGithubDesc: Sign in to connect your GitHub account

channels.emailImapHostDesc: IMAP server hostname for receiving emails

channels.emailAutoReplyDesc: Automatically reply to incoming emails with agent responses
channels.emailPollIntervalDesc: How often to check for new emails (minimum 5s)
channels.slackBotTokenDesc: Bot User OAuth Token from Slack API (xoxb-...)
channels.slackUserTokenDesc: User OAuth Token for user-level API calls (xoxp-...)

skillsHub.title: Skills Hub
skillsHub.discoverEmptySubtitle: If nothing appears, check your network or try a search above.
skillsHub.noInstalledDesc: Create a skill or import skills from local agent folders
skillsHub.author: Author
skillsHub.alwaysActiveTooltip: When enabled, the full skill content is always included in the agent's system prompt. When off, only the name and description are shown — the agent reads the full content on demand
skillsHub.nameTaken: A skill with this name already exists
skillsHub.nameInvalid: Name must be kebab-case (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens)
skillsHub.descriptionQualityMissing: No description — agent won't discover this skill
skillsHub.envConfigDesc: Set the required environment variables for this skill to work.
skillsHub.binInstallHint: Install via your system package manager
skillsHub.nameDesc: Unique kebab-case identifier for the skill
skillsHub.contentDesc: Write the SKILL.md body in Markdown. This is what the agent reads
skillsHub.scopeDesc: User skills are available across repos. Repo-specific skills are only loaded for that repo.
skillsHub.scopeDescEdit: Switching scope on save will move the skill folder between user-level and repo-specific storage.
skillsHub.binsDesc: CLI programs this skill needs (e.g. git, python, docker)
skillsHub.envDesc: Environment variables this skill requires (e.g. API_KEY)
skillsHub.licenseDesc: License name or reference to a bundled file
skillsHub.compatibilityDesc: Environment requirements (e.g. Requires Python 3.14+ and uv)
skillsHub.complianceMissingDesc: No description — agent cannot discover this skill
skillsHub.complianceTokensHigh: SKILL.md exceeds 5 000 tokens ({{count}}). Consider splitting into reference files.
skillsHub.bundledFilesDesc: Add scripts, references, or assets. Scripts are executed but not loaded into the context window
skillsHub.editorNoDraftDesc: Start by clicking Create on the Skills page, or pick a skill to edit.
skillsHub.deleteConfirmMessage: This will remove the skill and all its files. This action cannot be undone.

mcp.noServersDesc: Add an MCP server to extend agent capabilities with external tools.
mcp.serverNameDesc: Unique identifier for this MCP server
mcp.transportDesc: How the client connects to the MCP server
mcp.scopeDesc: Where to save: User (~/.orgii/mcp-servers.json) or Repo-specific (<repo>/.orgii/mcp-servers.json)
mcp.commandDesc: Executable to launch the server process
mcp.argsDesc: Shell-quoted command-line arguments. Use single or double quotes for args containing spaces (e.g. --root "/Users/me/My Docs")
mcp.urlDesc: Server endpoint for SSE or HTTP transport
mcp.enabledDesc: Enable or disable this MCP server
mcp.connectingTitle: Starting {{count}} MCP server(s)… (can take a few seconds)
mcp.connectingSlowBody: This may take a moment on first launch. If a server seems stuck, open its detail panel to reconnect.
mcp.savedDesc: has been added to your MCP config.
mcp.testHint: Test the connection before saving to verify the server is reachable.
mcp.addedToConfigDesc: has been added to your MCP config.
mcp.selectRegistryDesc: Choose an MCP server registry to browse
mcp.smitheryApiKeyRequired: Smithery API key required. Add it in Integrations → Connections → Add → Services.
mcp.autoApproveHint: Leave empty to confirm each call. Use * to approve all, or list tool names (space-separated) to approve selectively
mcp.cwdDesc: Optional. Spawn the server with this as its current directory. Leave blank for the app default
mcp.timeoutDesc: How long to wait for the initial handshake before treating the server as unreachable. Default 30s
mcp.deleteConfirmMessage: This will remove the server from the config file. Running sessions will be disconnected.

features.shell_snapshotDesc: Snapshot shell environment to speed up repeated commands

orgWizard.title: Add Org

hierarchyMode.label: Hierarchy mode

flat.description: No reporting hierarchy. Every member can message every other member directly. The Reports-to column is hidden

soft.label: Soft (recommended)
soft.description: Reports-to is shown to the LLM as an organizational hint. Routing is unrestricted at runtime — the LLM may message peers directly when sensible

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: Reports-to is enforced at runtime. A member can only message its manager, direct reports, or the coordinator. Sibling-to-sibling messaging is rejected

orgWizard.strictBanner: Strict mode: members can only message their manager, direct reports, or the coordinator. Sibling-to-sibling messaging is blocked at runtime.
orgWizard.missingParentWarn: In strict mode, top-level members report directly to the coordinator and can only reach the coordinator.

reachability.label: Strict-mode reachability
reachability.description: Dry-run preview of which agents can directly message which under the current chain. Use it to spot isolated members before launching
reachability.empty: Add at least one team member to see how strict-mode routing will look at runtime.
reachability.isolatedWarn: These members can only reach the coordinator — they cannot collaborate with peers under strict mode: {{names}}
reachability.blockedTitle: {{from}} cannot directly message {{to}} under strict mode — escalate via the coordinator instead

orgWizard.membersDesc: Each row is a routing alias. The coordinator addresses members by name; names must be unique. Role is a specialty hint shown to the LLM
orgWizard.memberNameDuplicate: Another member already uses this name. Names must be unique within the org.
orgWizard.coordinatorDesc: Lead agent that owns the coordinator session for this org run
orgWizard.deleteOrgDesc: Permanently delete this agent org. Member agents are not affected. This action cannot be undone

agentWizard.title: Config Agent
agentWizard.nameDesc: Unique name to identify this agent
agentWizard.defaultModelDesc: AI model used by this agent
agentWizard.maxToolUseConcurrencyDesc: Concurrent tool calls per assistant message. Default: 10.
agentWizard.subAgentWorktreeIsolationDesc: Run in a temporary git worktree (isolated file and shell access).

ruleKindsDesc.rule: Markdown instructions injected into the agent prompt

agentOrgs.ruleActionDesc: Write from scratch or import from an existing source
agentOrgs.markdownContentDesc: Markdown instructions injected into the agent system prompt

externalImport.noResults: No importable rules found. Looked in .cursor/rules, CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, .kiro/steering, and your home directory.
externalImport.partialFailure: Some items could not be imported:
externalImport.noSkillsResults: No importable skills found. Looked in ~/.claude/skills and ~/.claude/commands.

agentOrgs.applicableAgentsDesc: Which agents this rule applies to (leave empty for all)
agentOrgs.ruleSourceDesc: Choose User for all repos or Repo for one repo-specific guideline.
agentOrgs.ruleSourceUserDesc: A user preference available across repos.
agentOrgs.ruleSourceRepoDesc: A guideline stored for one selected repo.
agentOrgs.ruleRepoDesc: The single repo this guideline applies to
agentOrgs.ruleSourcePersonalDesc: Stored at ~/.orgii/personal/rules/. OS Agent / channel sessions only.

findSkills.title: Search Skills
findSkills.description: Search skills.sh and press Enter to show matching ORGII skills. Click a result to preview its SKILL.md in WorkStation.
findSkills.hint: Paste a skills.sh URL or id like vercel-labs/skills/find-skills. ORGII downloads the skill snapshot directly from skills.sh.
findSkills.emptySubtitle: Enter at least 2 characters, then press Enter to find Skills.

planning.title: Planning Stage
planning.description: Break down work into tasks and milestones

execution.title: Execution Stage
execution.description: Execute planned tasks with AI agents

merge.title: Merge Stage
merge.description: Merge approved changes to target branch

wait.title: Wait
wait.description: Pause execution for a specified time

injectPrompt.title: Inject Prompt
injectPrompt.description: Send a prompt to the agent

startSession.title: Start Session
startSession.description: Start a new coding agent session

sendMessage.title: Send Message
sendMessage.description: Send a message to a channel

injectToSession.title: Inject to Session
injectToSession.description: Send a message into a specific session

stageTransition.title: Stage Transition
stageTransition.description: Configure conditional or unconditional stage transitions

workflowConfig.title: Session Workflow Config
workflowConfig.description: Configure the full session workflow pipeline

agentOrgs.emptySelectionTitle: Select a member or an Agent Org
agentOrgs.emptySelectionSubtitle: Choose an Agent or Agent Org from the sidebar to view and configure it.
agentOrgs.deleteAgentMessage: "{{name}}" will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
agentOrgs.deleteOrgMessage: "{{name}}" will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

wizard.title: Add Database Connection
wizard.providerTypeDesc: Select the database engine for this connection
wizard.connectionNameDesc: A display name for this connection in the sidebar and agent tools
wizard.databaseFileDesc: Path to a local .sqlite, .sqlite3, or .db file
wizard.projectUrlDesc: Your Supabase project URL from the dashboard
wizard.accessTokenDesc: Service role or anon key for API access
wizard.databaseUrlDesc: libSQL connection URL from your Turso dashboard
wizard.authTokenDesc: Optional JWT token for authenticated access
wizard.neonConnStringDesc: PostgreSQL connection string from your Neon dashboard
wizard.pgHostDesc: Hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server
wizard.pgSslDesc: Enable for cloud-hosted databases (RDS, Cloud SQL, etc.)
wizard.mysqlHostDesc: Hostname or IP address of the MySQL server
wizard.savedDesc: The database connection has been saved. You can close this wizard.

devTools.multiPreviewEmpty: Select one or more event types

localModels.title: On prem
localModels.description: Detect this device and rank Ollama / llama.cpp friendly local models using a lightweight hardware-fit score.
localModels.emptyDescription: Run detection to see CPU, memory, GPU, and local model recommendations.
